templates.title: Gitea
templates.name: gitea
templates.description: Gitea is a painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service. It includes Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry, and CI/CD. It is similar to GitHub, Bitbucket and GitLab.

env.name: USER_UID
env.label: USER_UID
env.description: UID of the user running Gitea inside the container

env.name: USER_GID
env.label: USER_GID
env.description: GID of the user running Gitea inside the container

env.name: GITEA__server__DOMAIN
env.label: GITEA__server__DOMAIN
env.description: Domain or IP used to access Gitea (e.g. git.example.com). Required behind a reverse proxy.

env.name: GITEA__server__ROOT_URL
env.label: GITEA__server__ROOT_URL
env.description: Full public URL of Gitea (e.g. https://git.example.com/). Required behind a reverse proxy to fix clone URLs and webhooks.
